| Area of expertise | Lead Technical Volunteer | Supporting Technical Volunteers |
|------------------|----------------|--------------------------------|
| Git | Lauren Snaathorst | Lara Eddington and Menna Zayed |
| RShiny |Cam Race| Rich Bielby and Menna Zayed |
| R data manipulation |Menna Zayed| Lara Eddington and Lauren Snaathorst  |
| Automated QA | Lara Eddington| Rich Bielby, Cam Race, Lauren Snaathorst and Menna Zayed |
| LLMs | Philip Ovington |- |
| EES API | Rich Bielby  | Cam Race|
| Python | Mohamed Zayed |- |
